examples: Its neon displays have a retro feel and saxophone jazz eases from the speakers.
The 2009 Visions From The Past "kalender" provides plenty of fuel for one's retro rockets.
I've had kids come in with the retro T-shirts that they buy at Urban Outfitters, etc.
The owners proudly, and actively, encourage lounging, with free wi-fi and retro 1950s-style comfy furniture.
